title: Breakwave Tanker Report 2.10.2026
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 10/02/2026
VLCC Rates Remain Strong, Next Leg Depends on Demand - The sharp acceleration in VLCC freight seen in late January
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2026-02-10_BreakwaveTankersFebruary102026Report.pdf

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
February 10, 2026
• VLCC Rates Remain Strong, Next Leg Depends on Demand - The sharp
Short-term Indicators
acceleration in VLCC freight seen in late January appears to have peaked for
Momentum: Positive
now. Nevertheless, the Baltic Dirty Tanker Index continues to trade near multi-year
highs, reflecting the strong gains accumulated over recent months (around +90% Sentiment: Positive
YoY as of early February). The AG VLCC market showed softer momentum into Fundamentals: Positive
early February.
